case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. DESTINY ROBBYANN DORHAM

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DORHAM, DESTINY ROBBYANN $425.85 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $505.85 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $425.85 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DORHAM, DESTINY ROBBYANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED JAN-28-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DORHAM, DESTINY ROBBYANN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRISTINA CRUZ ESCOBAR IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
